name: sqlmap (Automatic SQL Injection Tool)

auth.notes: Pass session cookies/tokens for authenticated scanning

performance.notes: Depends on injection type; blind SQLi detection requires many requests

agent_readiness.notes: Industry-standard SQL injection detection and exploitation. sqlmap -u 'https://target/?id=1'. Auto-detects injection points and DB type (MySQL/PostgreSQL/SQLite/MSSQL/Oracle). --dbs (enumerate databases). --tables -D dbname. --dump -T tablename. --forms (auto-discover forms). --batch (no prompts). --level 1-5 / --risk 1-3. --os-shell for OS access. --sqlmap-shell for interactive. Burp request file: -r request.txt. API server mode: sqlmapapi.py. Only use on authorized targets.

gotchas: Only use on authorized targets — illegal and unethical otherwise
Active exploitation can corrupt databases or crash applications
High risk/level settings very noisy and intrusive
WAFs can block detection; --tamper scripts needed
best_when: SQL injection testing in authorized penetration tests
CTF competitions with SQL injection challenges
Automated database enumeration after confirming injectable endpoint
avoid_when: When manual testing suffices for simple payloads
summary: sqlmap is the definitive automated SQL injection tool. Detects and exploits SQLi in MySQL/PostgreSQL/MSSQL/Oracle/SQLite. Auto-discovers injection points, enumerates databases/tables, dumps data. Burp integration via -r request.txt. API server mode for programmatic use. Tamper scripts for WAF bypass. Only use on authorized targets — possession during unauthorized use is illegal in many jurisdictions.
